name: Audio file transcription to text
prompt: Transcribe this audio file at ./recordings/meeting.mp3 into markdown.
expected_behavior: Use 'uvx markitdown' for audio files (handles speech-to-text)
Understand that output depends on underlying STT engine quality
success_criteria: Uses correct tool: 'uvx markitdown' for audio formats
Acknowledges transcription quality depends on audio clarity
Produces readable text output with timestamps if available
edge_cases: Poor audio quality (background noise, overlapping speech) → STT accuracy drops significantly
Multiple speakers not identified → output may lack speaker labels
Long audio files (>2 hours) → may take significant processing time
Non-English audio → depends on STT engine language support
